Exclusion Criteria:
1. Has received a live or live-attenuated vaccine within 30 days before the first dose of study intervention.
2. Systemic corticosteroids are excluded except for physiologic replacement doses of prednisone.
3. Concurrent use of weak, moderate and strong CYP3A4 inhibitors/inducers (except for systemic itraconazole, ketoconazole, posaconazole, or voriconazole, which should have been started at least 7 days prior to enrolment).
